## Problem / Use Case

What problem does this solve? What workflow would it improve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the UI/UX you'd like to see.

## Mockups / References

If you have wireframes, screenshots, or links to similar implementations, include them here.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the request.
